landing.subhead: Build your dream Cancun proposal in under 3 minutes. We handle every detail — you just show up and ask.

planMode.title: How Would You Like to Plan?
planMode.subtitle: Choose your path — build every detail yourself, or pick one of our expertly curated packages.

premade.title: Premade Packages
premade.tagline: Curated by Jill and her team — ready to book
premade.body: Choose from three expertly designed packages. Everything is included — just add optional extras and you're set.

custom.title: Build Your Own
custom.tagline: Full creative control over every detail
custom.body: Pick your venue, statement props, flowers, structures, and more. Perfect for those who want to customize everything.

venue.cardIncludes: Includes: Coordination · 1.5 hrs · Cocktail table · Sparkling wine · Server · Speaker

structureFlower.priceHint: ${single} solo · ${bulk} each when ordering 2 or more

venue.title: Choose Your Setting
venue.subtitle: Every location includes a cocktail table and sparkling wine. Each venue has its own unique inclusions — see details below.

centerpiece.title: Choose Your Statement Prop
centerpiece.subtitle: This is the moment they'll replay forever. At least one statement prop is required.

flowers.title: Flowers & Enhancements
flowers.subtitle: Add sparklers and romantic floral touches to your setup. Select as many as you like, or skip.
flowers.sparklersDesc: Cold sparkler fountains — a dramatic WOW moment

addons.title: Capture & Music
addons.subtitle: Add photography, video, or live music. Everything here is optional.

enhancements.body: Add a structure to elevate the moment.
enhancements.dinnerPrompt: Want to see additional enhancements for your dinner?
enhancements.picnicPrompt: Want to see additional enhancements for your picnic?

hints.pickNeonMsg: Please select a message for your Neon Sign above
hints.pickStructureStyle: Please select a structure style for your Decorated Structure above
hints.pickGiantFrameMsg: Please select a message for your Decorated Structure's Neon Sign above
hints.pickInstrument: Please pick an instrument for your Solo Musician above

review.title: Your Perfect Proposal
review.goldenHourBody: After a decade of planning professional proposals in Cancún, we know the best time for an unforgettable moment is sunset. That's why we always reserve yours for this special hour.

photoUpsell.headline: 📸 94% of our clients add photography. Want to add it?

footer.retainerHeadline: 📅 Your package and date can only be reserved with a retainer fee
footer.retainerBody: Submitting an inquiry does not guarantee a booking. Jill's team will follow up to confirm availability.
footer.disclaimer: Prices are estimates. Final pricing confirmed with Jill and her team.

review.similarFromPortfolio: A similar setup from our portfolio

contact.heading: Your contact & trip details
contact.travelHint: Your full trip range — we'll confirm sunset availability within these dates.
contact.proposalDatePlaceholderReady: Pick a day within your trip
contact.fillPhone: Please fill in your phone number above to send your inquiry
contact.fillTravelDates: Please add your travel dates above so we can confirm availability
contact.fillRequired: Please complete the required fields above

savePlan.title: Save Your Plan
savePlan.subtitle: We'll email you a link to your custom proposal. Come back anytime to edit or book.
savePlan.error: Couldn't send the email. Please try again or message us via WhatsApp.
savePlan.noSpam: No spam. Just your saved proposal plan.
savePlan.savedBody: Check your inbox{greeting} (and your junk/spam folder, just in case). Your custom proposal plan is on its way.
savePlan.savedFollowUp: Jill and her team usually respond within a few hours if you decide to book.

list.title: Choose Your Package
list.subtitle: Each package is designed by Jill and her team with years of experience — everything you need for a perfect proposal.

exp.venue: Choose any of our stunning venues — Beach, Lagoon, or Rooftop
exp.coordination: Full event coordination from start to finish
exp.goldenHour: Timed to golden hour for the most magical lighting

extras.title: Add Extras
extras.subtitle: Enhance your package with photography, video, or live music. Everything here is optional.
